01_initial_request.input_data: Recent studies on EBV-mediated oncogenesis and ubiquitin–proteasome system interactions
01_initial_request.user_intent: To summarize versatile strategies in EBV-mediated oncogenesis that contribute to the development of specific therapeutic approaches
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: Development of specific therapeutic approaches to treat EBV-associated malignancies

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] UPS deregulation plays a critical role in human cancers. [Gap] Specific active ubiquitin-specific proteases (USP) in EBV-infected cells were not fully profiled. [Decision] To achieve identification of UPS involvement, chose to use chemistry-based functional proteomic screen to perform profiling on EBV-infected cells, expecting to obtain active USP list.

parameters.cell_lines: EBV-transformed lymphoblastoid cell line (LCL), Burkitt's lymphoma cell line Raji

02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP5/IsoT, USP7/HAUSP, USP9, and USP15i are higher expressed in LCL than Raji.

references.citation: Ovaa, H., et al. Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. USA 2004 [9]
references.relevance: Identified active ubiquitin-specific proteases in EBV-infected cells.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] EBNA1 is a key latent antigen. [Gap] Cellular proteins associated with EBNA1 via UPS were unknown. [Decision] To achieve mapping of interactions, chose to use affinity chromatography to perform in vitro binding analysis on EBNA1, expecting to obtain associated cellular proteins.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: EBNA1 associated with USP7/HAUSP, CK2, PRMT5.

references.citation: Holowaty, M.N., et al. J. Biol. Chem. 2003 [10]
references.relevance: Identified EBNA1 association with cellular proteins.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] EBNA1 interactions identified in vitro need in vivo validation. [Gap] In vivo interaction partners of EBNA1 were not confirmed. [Decision] To achieve validation, chose to use tandem affinity purification (TAP)-tagging to perform in vivo purification on EBNA1, expecting to obtain confirmed interaction complexes.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: EBNA1 associated with USP7/HAUSP, CK2, PRMT5.

references.citation: Holowaty, M.N., et al. J. Biol. Chem. 2003 [10]
references.relevance: Confirmed EBNA1 interaction complexes in vivo.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] LMP1 is essential for transformation and NF-kB activation. [Gap] E3 ligases interacting with LMP1 were not systematically identified. [Decision] To achieve identification of E3 ligases, chose to use co-immunoprecipitation coupled with mass spectrometry (IP-MS) to perform screening on LMP1, expecting to obtain interacting E3 ligases.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: LMP1 interacts with 19 E3 ligases, including CHIP and TRAFD1.

references.citation: Xu, C., et al. Front. Immunol. 2018 [55]
references.relevance: Screened LMP1 interactions with E3 ligases.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Proteasome inhibitors are used for cancer treatment. [Gap] Efficacy against EBV-positive Burkitt's lymphoma needed testing. [Decision] To achieve therapeutic evaluation, chose to use murine xenograft model to perform tumor growth assessment with Bortezomib, expecting to obtain tumor suppression data.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Tumor growth was almost completely halted after treatment.

references.citation: Fu, D.X., et al. Clin. Cancer Res. 2007 [103]; Fu, D.X., et al. Nat. Med. 2008 [104]
references.relevance: Demonstrated Bortezomib efficacy in EBV-positive tumor models.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Lytic reactivation can eliminate latent virus. [Gap] Specific small molecule inducers of EBV lytic cycle were needed. [Decision] To achieve identification of inducers, chose to use high throughput screening to perform compound library testing, expecting to obtain lytic reactivators.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: C60 consistently stimulated EBV lytic reactivation.

references.citation: Tikhmyanova, N., et al. ACS Chem. Biol. 2014 [120]
references.relevance: Identified small molecules that reactivate latent EBV.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] C60 compound identified as lytic inducer. [Gap] Mechanism of C60 action was unknown. [Decision] To achieve mechanism elucidation, chose to use biochemical affinity purification assay to perform target identification for C60, expecting to obtain binding partners.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: C60 directly targets the Cullin exchange factor CAND1.

references.citation: Tikhmyanova, N., et al. PLoS Pathog. 2017 [121]
references.relevance: Elucidated the molecular target of C60.

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Review of preclinical studies and clinical trial data

tumor_growth_suppression.interpretation: Bortezomib treatment effectively suppressed EBV-positive tumor growth in xenograft models.

lytic_reactivation.interpretation: Small molecule C60 successfully induced EBV lytic cycle from latency.

e3_ligase_interactions.interpretation: LMP1 interacts with multiple E3 ligases, confirming UPS manipulation.

03_success_verification.final_verdict: The ubiquitin-proteasome system is a central therapeutic target; proteasome inhibitors and DUB inhibitors show potential but require further development to address toxicity and resistance.
